items.title: Best Tested Ski Clothes (2026): Shells, Jackets, Wool Socks
items.description: From weatherproof jackets and pants to puffers, gloves, and socks, WIRED’s winter sports experts have got you covered.

items.title: Who’s Your Daddy? A Chatbot
items.description: More people are turning to AI to explore their BDSM fantasies, but some in the community feel it’s a cop-out.

items.title: The Best Headphones I’ve Tried (and Why I'd Buy Them All)
items.description: The portable listening revolution is fully underway. From open earbuds to noise cancelers and wired headphones, I can find a reason to love them all.

items.title: Why Sierra the Supercomputer Had to Die
items.description: For seven years, she ran high-security nuclear simulations for the US government. Now, this famous supercomputer is being put to death.

items.title: Factor Offers High Protein Meal Delivery Options (2026)
items.description: Even if you're incredibly busy, you can maintain your gains by eating the equivalent of the microwaveable chicken in The Fifth Element.
